title: Job Opening Category Manager at Jaypore International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Category Manager at Jaypore International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Join the Jaypore International Enterprises family as a Category Manager in Dhanbad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Jaypore International Enterprises:
Jaypore International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jaypore International Enterprises!
